title: Upload app to TestFlight for internal QA
summary: Create a release slice for HumbleStudio that determines the applicable Apple app target, prepares a signed candidate build, uploads it to App Store Connect/TestFlight, and records durable evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Verify whether the current HumbleStudio native app target is TestFlight-capable before attempting upload work.
Verify bundle ID, signing setup, marketing version, and build number before archiving.
Run the strongest practical release or workflow validation and record exact command evidence on this ticket.
Upload the candidate build to App Store Connect/TestFlight or record the verified not-applicable reason.
Record latest build visibility, processing state, internal tester availability, or the exact account/tooling blocker.

trigger.source_ref: Jan asked to create a TestFlight upload ticket for every repository and mark repositories that already have a TestFlight build as done.

agent_notes: Do not mark solved until App Store Connect/TestFlight build evidence or a verified account/tooling blocker is recorded.
